SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-09-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-09-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF DANIEL A. ZOSH IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. SHAHLA RANDLE TESTIFIES ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFF VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO BREWING CO, LLC, REPRESENTED BY JOSH LEAVY, OWNER IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. GEOFFREY PERRY, GENERAL MANAGER FOR SAN FRANCISCO BREWEING COMPANY, IS AUTHORIZED TO SPEAK ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT, BY ORAL AUTHORIZATION OF JOSH LEAVY VIA ZOOM. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-21-2021 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JUL-09-2021 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF DANIEL A. ZOSH IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM APPEARANCE. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO BREWING CO. LLC IS PRESENT BY UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM APPEARANCE REPRESENTED BY JOSH LEAVY. DEFENDANT WISHES TO BE HEARD AND THEREFORE REQUESTS A CONTINUANCE. PLAINTIFF MR. ZOSH DOES NOT NEED TO SUBMIT A ZOOM REQUEST FOR NEXT HEARING DATE. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZOSH, DANIEL A RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO BREWING CO LLC. $4,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,090.00, SEE ATTACHED MC-025 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
